title: hieracium lonchites
intro: Hieracium lonchites, also known as Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, including its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and act as a diuretic. Hieracium lonchites is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, which can be used to treat various ailments, including skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues.
